textByHash.cd8baa1924ee5bab93ef416cf2909c06530dec75: Oh hello there, you've come to the right place.
textByHash.2da1be5b1cc7bb93bc77df7c6c9429927d92b313: I am sorry but the people of Port Piscarilius does not favour you currently. I have to get back to my duties.
textByHash.c2fa60c295f379fe8575768f04cfdd7c89486379: Indeed, rather proud of it myself, look at those fingernails.
textByHash.54360055ee95612549bc6bfe5f2ceb9be3860341: I am indeed, fastest builder in Kourend and a dab hand at sculpture. How can I help?
textByHash.f07ae22858c9f887bab325b59f7b52994667dc8c: Oh really? Who was he then?
textByHash.d5100f980bdb4383c0e33c065e9bc3e1d1f3bd44: Of course I do, just pulling your leg. Sounds like a great idea, though I am only good at doing arms and hands on big statues - is that of use?
textByHash.8e350b39373ec86658fd3074c15eccb2685b06ac: Yes, yes, I'm on my way, just collecting my things! I'll be there shortly.
textByHash.02d7b6cdaee3d813f0a1407a0e2f54135661cc90: You earned the favour of my people and I think it's right that we honour the founding of our city in this way, that is why I am here.
